creator: peo@nethead.se
text:
FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA3 #0 r338287 on RPI3

With default options

/usr/local/bin and sbin seems to be mixed up

/usr/bin/make  install-am
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
  /bin/sh ../libtool   --mode=install install  -s -m 555 ntp-keygen ntptime tickadj '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
libtool: install: install -m 555 -s ntp-keygen /usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/bin/ntp-keygen
libtool: install: install -m 555 -s ntptime /usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/bin/ntptime
libtool: install: install -m 555 -s tickadj /usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/bin/tickadj
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/libexec'
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/sbin'
/usr/bin/make  install-exec-hook
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ntp'
 install  -m 0644 ./ntp-keygen.html '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ntp'
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1'
 install  -m 0644 ntp-keygen.1 '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1'
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8'
Making install in tests
Making install in bug-2803
/usr/bin/make  install-am
Making install in libntp
/usr/bin/make  install-am
Making install in ntpd
/usr/bin/make  install-am
Making install in ntpq
/usr/bin/make  install-am
Making install in sandbox
/usr/bin/make  install-am
Making install in sec-2853
/usr/bin/make  install-am
Installing stand-alone HTML documentation
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/net/ntp/work/ntp-4.2.8p12/conf/* /usr/ports/net/ntp/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/ntp
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
